DB.DBA.URLREWRITE_CREATE_REGEX_RULE (
    'boundary_rule2',
    1,
    '^/~(.*)',
    vector('uname'),
    1,
    '/user/%s',
    vector('uid'),
    null,
    null,
    2,
    null,
    'Custom-Header: Value'
    );

DB.DBA.URLREWRITE_CREATE_REGEX_RULE (
    'complex_rule2',
    1,
    '^/(.*?)(/.*)',
    vector('slug', 'context'),
    1,
    '/content/%s',
    vector('slug'),
    null,
    null,
    3,
    null,
    'X-Custom-Header: Example'
    );

DB.DBA.URLREWRITE_CREATE_REGEX_RULE (
    'nested_rule2',
    1,
    '^/(.*?)/(.*?)/(.+)',
    vector('type', 'action'),
    1,
    '/dispatch/%s/%s',
    vector('type', 'action'),
    null,
    null,
    4,
    null,
    'Another-Custom-Header: Test'
    );
